description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a dual-barrel configuration, each barrel marked with yellow bands and vented ribbing along the top. The main body is constructed from a dark, matte-finished material, likely metal, with visible structural reinforcements and a boxy receiver. A prominent pistol grip and a compact, squared-off stock are present, providing ergonomic handling. The underside includes a magazine or battery compartment, and the trigger guard is elongated and rectangular, offering ample space for gloved fingers. The overall appearance suggests a modern, utilitarian weapon suitable for urban environments, with visible mechanical details and a rugged finish.
description: A modern, dual-barrel tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, yellow barrel markings, and a pistol grip. It features a robust, reinforced body and a squared-off stock.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the twin barrels aligned vertically and the yellow markings at the tips.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the dual barrels, vented ribbing, pistol grip, boxy receiver, and the magazine or battery compartment beneath.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the compact, squared-off stock and the alignment of the barrels are visible, with the grip and trigger guard partially seen.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile mirrors view 1, showing the same dual-barrel structure, grip, and mechanical details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with vented ribbing and yellow markings at the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated rectangular trigger guard with ample space and straight edges
